name: Jungler

auth.notes: API requests use an X-API-Key header and most operations require a workspace_id.

rateLimits: Endpoint-specific limits found: workspaces 30/min, signals 30/min, posts 60/min, workbooks 30/min, engagers 60/min.
notes: Jungler has a useful public API documentation surface but no official MCP, CLI, SDK, or OpenAPI spec found.
The API is object-oriented enough for agents to use directly with careful pagination and workspace handling.
GitHub fallback search did not surface a strong maintained community MCP, CLI, or SDK.
